allow: Bash(printf 'feat: Add /budget command with NGO grants and citywide pension/benefits\\n\\nRenames /homeless to /budget. Adds grants-to-subrecipients breakdown \(NGO/nonprofit\\npass-through\) and citywide pension contributions + health/dental benefits from the\\nAustin Open Budget dataset. Trims help text fluff.')

Bash(printf 'fix: Label partial FY, use completed year for trends, fix extra blank lines\\n\\nDetects in-progress Austin fiscal year \(ends Sep 30\) and labels it "\(partial\)"\\nin all budget sections. Trend arrows compare first to last completed year only,\\navoiding misleading signals from partial-year actuals. Fixes spurious blank lines\\nwhen budget_trend returns empty string.')

Bash(printf 'feat: Add live traffic incidents and crash stats to /traffic command\\n\\nAdds two new buttons to the /traffic menu:\\n- Live Incidents: real-time active incidents from dx9v-zd7x, grouped by\\n  severity-ordered type with address, age, and responding agency\\n- Crash Stats: 90-day summary + YTD fatalities from y2wy-tgr5, including\\n  pedestrian/bicycle deaths and top collision types')

Bash(printf 'feat: Add live traffic incidents and crash stats to /traffic command\\n\\nAdds two new buttons to the /traffic menu:\\n- Live Incidents: real-time active incidents from dx9v-zd7x, grouped by\\n severity-ordered type with address, age, and responding agency\\n- Crash Stats: 90-day summary + YTD fatalities from y2wy-tgr5, including\\n pedestrian/bicycle deaths and top collision types')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{s['service_code']:15} {s['service_name']}\\"\) for s in data[:40]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2\)\); print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(r['sample_date'][:10], r.get\('watershed',''\), r.get\('parameter',''\)\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
